chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.718 of 2024 (Ahmed alias MA and another v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 29.04.2024 Mr. Maqsood Alam, advocate for the applicants Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ----------------------------------- It is alleged that the applicants with one more culprit robbed complainant Noman Ahmed of his motorcycle and money, and for that, the present case was registered. The applicants on having been refused bail by learned XI- Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi, West have sought the same from this Court by way of instant bail application under Section 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The FIR of the incident has been lodged with a delay of about one day, yet it does not contain the names and descriptions of the applicants. The complainant did not turn up to identify the applicants before the Magistrate, which appears to be surprising. The recovery of the motorcycle and money is alleged by the applicants to have been foisted upon them by the police. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicants. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicants on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. Under the given circumstances, the applicants are admitted to bail subject to their furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly.

Under the given circumstances, the applicants are admitted to bail subject to their furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nadir
